title: My Hero Academia: Post-Series Extra - More
description: Optional Chapter 431 'More' post-series extra overlay for manga-primary My Hero Academia. Adds adult-life, Quirk Counseling, relationship, ranking, and future-guard lore that should not leak into the default Chapter 430 epilogue deck.
author: Saga

cover.alt: Deck cover placeholder for My Hero Academia: Post-Series Extra - More

banner.alt: Wide banner placeholder for My Hero Academia: Post-Series Extra - More

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia Chapter 431 'More' from Volume 42. Optional post-series extra overlay after Chapter 430; not loaded by default for the Chapter 430 epilogue deck.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded unless added as separate overlay decks. Chapter 431 material should not leak into earlier school-era, war, or Chapter 430 scenes unless this overlay is active.

dependencies.reason: Uses core My Hero Academia entities, Quirk-system tags, hero-system tags, and baseline continuity anchors.
Chapter 431 More builds on Chapter 430 adult epilogue state and should usually be stacked after the Final War and Epilogue deck.

license.name: Draft fan reference data
license.notes: For local testing. Requires human canon review before reference release.

health.notes: Local smoke validation only; not a substitute for in-app Saga Deck Health or human canon review.
